nasb.text: As a well keeps its waters fresh, So she keeps fresh her wickedness. Violence and destruction are heard in her; Sickness and wounds are ever before Me.

esv.text: As a well keeps its water fresh, so she keeps fresh her evil; violence and destruction are heard within her; sickness and wounds are ever before me.

cnv.text: 井怎樣湧出水來， 這城也怎樣湧出惡來； 城中常常聽到強暴和毀滅的事， 在我面前不斷有病患與創傷。

ccb.text: 她的邪恶如同泉水涌流不息， 暴力和毁灭层出不穷， 疾病和伤痛接连不断。
